title: Mellow Spicy Mexican Chicken Stir Fry
description: A low-carb Mexican dish featuring chicken, muscovado sugar, and a blend of spices, perfect for a sick day or a weeknight dinner. This stir-fry has a mustardy and velvety texture with a touch of Chiapan flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the muscovado sugar to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the spice and sugar mixture.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
